2606.28841.title: LAMP: Lean-based Agentic framework with MCP and Proof Repair
2606.28841.paper_summary: Large language models are increasingly capable of mathematical reasoning, but the proofs they generate are often unreliable and hard to verify. Interactive theorem provers such as Lean 4 address this by accepting only kernel-checked proofs; however, their reach is bounded by the formalized knowledge available. While Mathlib, a repository of formalized Lean 4 theorems that covers diverse mathematical areas, certain specialized areas remain underrepresented; notably, the domain of Combinatorics on Words (CoW). CoW studies sequences, exploring their properties such as periodicity, borders, conjugacy, and morphisms. As a result, specialized provers, trained on Mathlib-centered data, lack the lemmas to operate in CoW. We present two contributions. First, we introduce a Lean 4 formalization of CoW containing eight modules and \textbf{93} declarations of core definitions and foundational lemmas. Second, we present LAMP, a multi-agent framework that synthesizes kernel-verified Lean 4 proofs by providing explicit, structured domain knowledge at inference time through an ontology, rather than by fine-tuning a prover. LAMP coordinates a Planner, Builder, and Verifier with Model Context Protocol based access to a domain-specific CoW ontology. In a suite of 90 CoW theorems that span all eight modules and three difficulty levels, LAMP synthesizes verified proofs for 96.7% of theorems, substantially exceeding both an unscaffolded baseline and existing specialized provers. An ablation shows that removing LAMP's tool-grounded architecture or its Planner/Builder separation each cost roughly 12 percentage points, even with the backbone model held fixed.
2606.28841.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型在數學推理方面的能力日益增強，但它們生成的證明往往不可靠且難以驗證。像 Lean 4 這樣的互動定理證明器通過僅接受內核檢查的證明來解決這個問題；然而，它們的覆蓋範圍受限於可用的形式化知識。雖然 Mathlib 是一個涵蓋多個數學領域的形式化 Lean 4 定理的庫，但某些專門領域仍然代表性不足；尤其是字串組合學（CoW）領域。CoW 研究序列，探索其性質，如周期性、邊界、共軛性和同態。因此，專門的證明器在以 Mathlib 為中心的數據上訓練，缺乏在 CoW 中運作的引理。我們提出了兩項貢獻。首先，我們介紹了一個包含八個模塊和 \textbf{93} 條核心定義和基礎引理的 CoW Lean 4 形式化。其次，我們介紹了 LAMP，一個多代理框架，它通過在推理時提供明確的、結構化的領域知識來合成內核驗證的 Lean 4 證明，而不是通過微調證明器。LAMP 協調一個規劃者、建構者和驗證者，基於模型上下文協議訪問領域特定的 CoW 本體。在涵蓋所有八個模塊和三個難度級別的 90 個 CoW 定理的套件中，LAMP 為 96.7% 的定理合成了驗證過的證明，顯著超過了未經支撐的基準和現有的專門證明器。一項消融實驗顯示，去除 LAMP 的工具基礎架構或其規劃者/建構者分離各自約損失 12 個百分點，即使基礎模型保持不變。
2606.28841.author: Santhana Srinivasan R et.al.
